_meta.what: BLIND stimulus for the novelty-reserve pressure. No labels, no answer. The measure (scripts/novelty-reserve.mjs) reads this and emits per-condition channels; only the scorer (scripts/novelty-reserve-score.mjs) reads the held key (data/novelty-reserve-key.json).
_meta.construction: Each condition is a 7-unit reading in one sense. Units 0-2 are a shared preamble that admits three entities. Units 3-5 are the MANIPULATED WINDOW: 'newcomers' admits three brand-new entities, 'one_recurs' re-mentions one preamble entity three times, 'old_recur' cycles the three preamble entities. Unit 6 is the PROBE: a brand-new entity (new in every condition). Every unit deposits exactly one INS, so accumulated figure mass at the probe is identical across conditions — only the RATE of newcomer arrivals differs.

drawn_axes.target: INS at Existence × the reserve (the protention atom)

_meta.seed_of_record: inside-out draw on the constant src/core/surprise.js:21 NOVELTY_RESERVE (= src/perceiver/reading.js:23 NOVELTY); content fixed by the sampler, not drawn from a Wikipedia article (a constant-hunt cycle)
